requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (PNS IEC 60335-2-24 + BPS Mandatory Product Certification)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（PNS IEC 60335-2-24 + BPS强制产品认证）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（PNS IEC 60335-2-24 + BPS強制產品認證）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances sold in the Philippines must comply with the Philippine National Standard PNS IEC 60335-2-24 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), read together with the general standard PNS IEC 60335-1. Electrical appliances under a Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS) technical regulation are subject to mandatory product certification: locally manufactured units carry the Philippine Standard (PS) Quality and/or Safety Certification Mark, while imported units require an Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) issued by BPS under the Department of Trade and Industry (DTI). Certification covers protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, earthing continuity, thermal cut-outs, creepage and clearance distances, and rating-plate markings. Testing must be performed by a BPS-recognised testing laboratory and the rating plate must reflect the 230 V 60 Hz Philippine supply.
summary.zh: 在菲律宾销售的家用制冷器具须符合菲律宾国家标准PNS IEC 60335-2-24（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），并须与通用标准PNS IEC 60335-1结合使用。属于菲律宾标准局（BPS）技术法规管控的电器须接受强制产品认证：本地生产的产品加贴菲律宾标准（PS）质量和/或安全认证标志，进口产品则须取得由贸易工业部（DTI）下属BPS签发的进口商品检验放行（ICC）。认证涵盖防触电保护、绝缘电阻与介电强度、接地连续性、热断路器、爬电距离与电气间隙以及铭牌标识。检测须由BPS认可的检测实验室完成，且铭牌须反映菲律宾230 V 60 Hz供电。
summary.zht: 在菲律賓銷售的家用製冷器具須符合菲律賓國家標準PNS IEC 60335-2-24（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），並須與通用標準PNS IEC 60335-1結合使用。屬於菲律賓標準局（BPS）技術法規管控的電器須接受強制產品認證：本地生產的產品加貼菲律賓標準（PS）質量和/或安全認證標誌，進口產品則須取得由貿易工業部（DTI）下屬BPS簽發的進口商品檢驗放行（ICC）。認證涵蓋防觸電保護、絕緣電阻與介電強度、接地連續性、熱斷路器、爬電距離與電氣間隙以及銘牌標識。檢測須由BPS認可的檢測實驗室完成，且銘牌須反映菲律賓230 V 60 Hz供電。

standards_or_laws: PNS IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (adopted by BPS from IEC 60335-2-24)
PNS IEC 60335-1 — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)
BPS Mandatory Product Certification — PS Quality/Safety Certification Mark (local manufacture) and Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) for imports, under DTI/BPS technical regulations
Republic Act No. 4109 (Standards Law) and DTI Department Administrative Orders establishing the BPS product certification regime

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24 but incorporating Chinese national deviations and a 220 V 50 Hz supply basis. GB 4706.13-2014 is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated certification body before sale in China. CCC test reports issued by Chinese laboratories against GB 4706.13 are not automatically accepted by BPS for Philippine ICC or PS certification.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24，但包含中国国家偏差并以220 V 50 Hz供电为基准。GB 4706.13-2014为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度执行；产品须经CNCA指定认证机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。中国实验室依据GB 4706.13出具的CCC检测报告不被BPS自动接受用于菲律宾ICC或PS认证。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24，但包含中國國家偏差並以220 V 50 Hz供電為基準。GB 4706.13-2014為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度執行；產品須經CNCA指定認證機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。中國實驗室依據GB 4706.13出具的CCC檢測報告不被BPS自動接受用於菲律賓ICC或PS認證。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Both China GB 4706.13 and Philippine PNS IEC 60335-2-24 trace back to the same IEC 60335-2-24 parent, so technical content overlaps substantially. However, three gaps remain: (1) No CCC reciprocity — BPS requires its own certification pathway; a Chinese CCC certificate does not transfer, and an Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) must be obtained through a Philippine importer with testing at or accepted by a BPS-recognised laboratory. (2) Supply-voltage verification — GB 4706.13 testing is conducted on a 220 V 50 Hz basis; PNS IEC 60335-2-24 requires the appliance to be rated and verified for 230 V 60 Hz, so motor, compressor, thermal protector, and rating-plate parameters must be re-confirmed for Philippine mains. (3) National deviations and markings — the rating plate, plug type, and instruction language must meet Philippine requirements; CB Scheme (IEC 60335-2-24) reports may reduce re-testing scope but BPS acceptance and ICC issuance still apply.
gap.zh: 中国GB 4706.13与菲律宾PNS IEC 60335-2-24均源自同一IEC 60335-2-24母标准，故技术内容高度重叠。但仍存在三项差距：（1）无CCC互认——BPS要求其自有认证路径；中国CCC证书不可转移，须经菲律宾进口商取得进口商品检验放行（ICC），并由BPS认可的实验室检测或接受其报告。（2）供电电压核验——GB 4706.13以220 V 50 Hz为基准检测；PNS IEC 60335-2-24要求器具按230 V 60 Hz额定并验证，故须针对菲律宾电网重新确认电机、压缩机、热保护器及铭牌参数。（3）国家偏差与标识——铭牌、插头类型及说明书语言须符合菲律宾要求；CB体系（IEC 60335-2-24）报告或可缩减重新检测范围，但仍须经BPS接受并签发ICC。
gap.zht: 中國GB 4706.13與菲律賓PNS IEC 60335-2-24均源自同一IEC 60335-2-24母標準，故技術內容高度重疊。但仍存在三項差距：（1）無CCC互認——BPS要求其自有認證路徑；中國CCC證書不可轉移，須經菲律賓進口商取得進口商品檢驗放行（ICC），並由BPS認可的實驗室檢測或接受其報告。（2）供電電壓核驗——GB 4706.13以220 V 50 Hz為基準檢測；PNS IEC 60335-2-24要求器具按230 V 60 Hz額定並驗證，故須針對菲律賓電網重新確認電機、壓縮機、熱保護器及銘牌參數。（3）國家偏差與標識——銘牌、插頭類型及說明書語言須符合菲律賓要求；CB體系（IEC 60335-2-24）報告或可縮減重新檢測範圍，但仍須經BPS接受並簽發ICC。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — BPS product certification (PS Mark for local manufacture or ICC for imports) to PNS IEC 60335-2-24 required before sale or customs release in the Philippines; administered by BPS/DTI
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS), Department of Trade and Industry (DTI)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] BPS product certification to PNS IEC 60335-2-24 is mandatory for household refrigerating appliances entering the Philippine market. Chinese CCC certification to GB 4706.13 does not transfer; an Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) must be obtained through a Philippine importer, with testing at or accepted by a BPS-recognised laboratory. The 230 V 60 Hz Philippine supply differs from China 220/380 V 50 Hz, so electrical ratings and rating-plate data must be re-verified. IECEE CB Scheme reports may reduce re-testing scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入菲律宾市场的家用制冷器具须强制取得BPS依据PNS IEC 60335-2-24的产品认证。中国依据GB 4706.13的CCC认证不可转移；须经菲律宾进口商取得进口商品检验放行（ICC），并由BPS认可的实验室检测或接受其报告。菲律宾230 V 60 Hz供电与中国220/380 V 50 Hz不同，故须重新核验电气额定值及铭牌数据。IECEE CB体系报告或可缩减重新检测范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入菲律賓市場的家用製冷器具須強制取得BPS依據PNS IEC 60335-2-24的產品認證。中國依據GB 4706.13的CCC認證不可轉移；須經菲律賓進口商取得進口商品檢驗放行（ICC），並由BPS認可的實驗室檢測或接受其報告。菲律賓230 V 60 Hz供電與中國220/380 V 50 Hz不同，故須重新核驗電氣額定值及銘牌數據。IECEE CB體系報告或可縮減重新檢測範圍。
